notes: Regulars + food. The matriarch's kitchen, the wedding shower roster, the recipe arguments. Lighter than the pasture.

threads.subject: the wedding shower roster · who's bringing what

op.body:
Becca's shower is the 22nd. The roster as of this morning:
  · Mrs. Cooper · the casserole
  · Mrs. Hall · the deviled eggs
  · Mrs. Salinas · the sheet cake
  · Becca's aunt from Plainview · the punch
  · Me · the kitchen

We still need someone on the side salad and someone on the rolls. Foals — speak up. — WM.

replies.body: I will bring the rolls. The rolls I bring will be the rolls my mother brought to the shower at the Cooper place in 1964. I will bring them in the same basket. The basket has been used for thirty-two showers. The basket is a witness. — h.

threads.subject: the sheet cake from Sunday · how was the icing

op.body:
Mrs. Salinas's sheet cake survived the drive from her kitchen to the church in 96-degree heat. The icing held. The icing held because Mrs. Salinas put the cake in the deep freeze the night before and the icing was applied at 6 AM after the cake had warmed to refrigerator temperature.

That is the answer to the question everyone is going to ask. Now stop asking. — WM.
